topic: Z.ai (Zhipu AI) API Developer Guide 2026: GLM Models, Pricing, and Setup

stats.fact: GLM-5.1 scored 58.4 on SWE-Bench Pro, topping the global leaderboard ahead of GPT-5.4 (57.7) and Claude Opus 4.6 (57.3) as of April 2026
GLM-5.1 achieves 77.8% on SWE-bench Verified, within 3 points of Claude Opus 4.6 (80.8%) and GPT-5.2 (80.0%)
Zhipu AI revenue jumped 131.9% to HK$724.3 million ($105.2 million) for the 12 months to December 31, 2025
Zhipu AI has around 100,000 monthly API users and 3 million free chatbot users overseas as of late 2025
Over 4 million SMEs and developers have collaborated with Zhipu AI products, available in 218 countries and regions
Zhipu raised $558M via IPO on January 8, 2026, with a current market cap of $54 billion
GLM-5.1 is a 744B parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 40B active parameters and a 200K token context window
GLM-5.1 pricing: $1.05 per million input tokens and $3.50 per million output tokens
GLM-4.7-Flash is free for all registered Z.ai users with a concurrency limit of 1 and 1,000 requests/day
Zhipu AI overseas users grew tenfold year-over-year as of 2026

angles: Z.ai as the only non-Anthropic provider offering Anthropic-compatible endpoints — making GLM a drop-in Claude replacement
Budget developer angle: get GPT-5-level coding performance at lower cost with GLM-5.1 at $1.05/M input tokens
GLM-5.1 is the first open-source model to top SWE-Bench Pro, beating closed frontier models — MIT license bonus
Z.ai dual API compatibility (OpenAI + Anthropic) means zero migration friction from existing codebases
Coding Plan subscription vs pay-per-token: which model saves developers more money at different usage levels
Chinese AI API going global: Z.ai serves 218 countries with enterprise-grade reliability after $558M IPO
GLM-4.7-Flash: the hidden free model with 200K context that beats many paid alternatives
